$comment: Config for the Morphe auto-build pipeline. All apps publish to ONE rolling release (release_tag). Each build enables EVERY patch compatible with the app (app-specific + universal); list per-app exceptions in 'disable'.

apps.$disable_comment: Patch names to keep OFF even though they're compatible. Empty = apply all.
